turns.input_text: Product Line: Powertrain, VCU: MCU-2301, Security Level: Medium, Build Flavor: Debug, Vehicle Program: EV-Sedan-A. The bearing housing shows excessive vibration at high RPM.
Update: Security Level changed to High. The vibration is now also present at low RPM ranges.
Additional info: The issue only occurs when the vehicle is under load, not during free revving.
Product Line: ADAS, VCU: ADC-7703, Security Level: Critical, Build Flavor: Release, Vehicle Program: Sedan-Lux-D. AEB system triggering false positives on highway.
Did the conflict detection results change?
Update: The issue is now also reproducible in urban driving at low speeds.
